name: chain__outreach_infrastructure_sprint__crea
method: # Outreach Infrastructure Sprint  **Created:** 2026-02-19 **Status:** READY TO EXECUTE **Assets:** 9,123 hot leads (HOT_LEADS_QUALIFIED.csv) | 13,221 cold emails pre-generated (cold_emails_ready.csv)

stages.task: Validate and dedupe HOT_LEADS_QUALIFIED.csv against existing OUTBOUND leads, remove stale/bounced domains
Score leads by recency and signal strength, prioritize highest-intent leads for first batches
Send daily batch of 50 emails from cold_emails_ready.csv using warmed accounts (BLOCKED: needs accounts)
Monitor replies, classify as positive/negative/bounce, route positive to INBOUND_LEADS.csv
Positive replies → schedule follow-up, update OUTREACH_PIPELINE.csv status, trigger KPI update
